text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is dejected after<n>reading a
critical magazine article<n>about her run in the Kinko
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Coming to regret her heavy reliance<n>on luck, she
hopes to make amends<n>with her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We decide to enter the Takarazuka<n>Kinen next, a
race where the entrants<n>are invited to participate
based on fan<n>votes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Believing no one wants her to<n>compete,
Matikanefukukitaru<n>wallows in sadness.
